1_Core_Java_Basics: JDK vs JRE vs JVM: Understanding the Java Platform
Java Program Structure: main method, packages, imports
Primitive Data Types: int, long, double, char, boolean
Operators: Arithmetic, Relational, Logical, Bitwise, Ternary
Control Flow: if-else, switch, for, while, do-while
Strings: String class, String Pool, Immutability
2_OOP_Concepts: Classes and Objects: Fields, Methods, Constructors
Encapsulation: Access Modifiers (public, private, protected, default)
static keyword: static fields, methods, blocks, nested classes
final keyword: final variables, methods, classes
Object class methods: equals(), hashCode(), toString(), clone()
Nested Classes: Static Nested, Inner, Local, Anonymous
4_Collections_Framework: Collection Hierarchy: Iterable, Collection, List, Set, Queue, Map
LinkedList: Doubly linked, use as Deque
Collections utility class: sort, shuffle, reverse, binarySearch
5_Generics: Bounded Type Parameters: extends and super
6_Java8_Features: Lambda Expressions: Syntax and Use Cases
Functional Interfaces: Predicate, Function, Consumer, Supplier, BiFunction
Stream Intermediate Operations: filter, map, flatMap, sorted, distinct, limit
Stream Terminal Operations: collect, forEach, reduce, count, findFirst, anyMatch
Collectors: toList, toSet, toMap, groupingBy, partitioningBy, joining
Default and Static Methods in Interfaces
New Date and Time API: LocalDate, LocalTime, LocalDateTime, ZonedDateTime
7_Multithreading_and_Concurrency: Thread Lifecycle: New, Runnable, Running, Blocked, Terminated
Creating Threads: Thread class and Runnable interface
Thread Methods: start, run, sleep, join, interrupt, yield
8_IO_and_NIO: Byte Streams: InputStream, OutputStream, FileInputStream, FileOutputStream
Character Streams: Reader, Writer, FileReader, FileWriter
Walking a Directory Tree with Files.walk()
Reading and Writing Files with Files utility class
9_Advanced_Java: Reflection API: Class, Method, Field objects
Annotations: Built-in, Custom Annotations, Retention, Target
GC Algorithms: Serial, Parallel, G1, ZGC, Shenandoah
JVM Tuning: Heap size, GC flags
Java Memory Areas: Heap, Stack, Method Area, PC Register
10_Spring_Framework: Spring Core: IoC Container and Dependency Injection
Spring AOP: Aspect, Advice, Pointcut, JoinPoint
Spring Boot: Auto-configuration, Starters, Embedded Server
Spring Data JPA: Repositories, JPQL, Named Queries
11_Design_Patterns_in_Java: Creational: Singleton, Factory Method, Abstract Factory, Builder, Prototype
Structural: Adapter, Bridge, Composite, Decorator, Facade, Flyweight, Proxy
Behavioral: Chain of Responsibility, Command, Iterator, Mediator, Memento, Observer, State, Strategy, Template Method, Visitor
12_Testing_in_Java: Integration Testing with Spring Boot Test
13_Build_Tools: Maven: POM.xml, Dependencies, Plugins, Lifecycle Phases
